sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59720" key="krathsi/pous" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρᾰτησῐ´-πους</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ποδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n59720.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">victorious in the footrace</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0033.tlg002.perseus-grc1:10:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
